channel.title: MCP Radar — new MCP servers
channel.description: New and trending Model Context Protocol servers, auto-discovered from GitHub daily.

item.title: EndymionLee/PilotBrowseMCP
item.description: A browser runtime that lets AI agents control your real Chrome browser via MCP. Agents can explore websites, generate operation manuals, and reuse them to save tokens. AI操控你的真实浏览器。 — ⭐40, TypeScript

item.title: bilieebiliee1-design/SOMCP
item.description: Android-native SO reverse engineering MCP server — ⭐21, Kotlin

item.title: 0xsline/OpenChatCut
item.description: Local-first conversational AI video editor with a professional multi-track timeline, Agent Skills, MCP integration, and Remotion-powered rendering. — ⭐12, TypeScript

item.title: EMahmoudNabil/slnmap
item.description: A local knowledge graph + MCP server that gives AI coding agents a map of your .NET codebase — ⭐6, C#

item.title: northXD/nxrth
item.description: Native C++ Growtopia mbot client with ltoken login, geiger support + auto geiger, MCP Server. — ⭐6, C++

item.title: Adr1an04/erga-mcp
item.description: Organize and track job applications and tailor LaTeX resumes from the CLI or an MCP client. — ⭐6, Python

item.title: ltxzs/claude-subagent-mcp
item.description: 通过mcp的形式在Codex中调用claude code CLI实现claude负责实现代码,Codex负责审查代码.Local stdio MCP server that delegates implementation tasks to Claude Code for Codex review workflows. — ⭐4, JavaScript

item.title: prahaladuk2208-arch/geeflow
item.description: MCP server that lets Claude run Google Earth Engine — ⭐3, Python

item.title: Enoch666/suanming-mcp
item.description: 玄机阁算命 MCP Server — 八字排盘、六爻起卦、灵签抽签、姓名打分、起名、程序员黄历。传统中国风水墨 HTML 命理报告。 — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: Reanthesis/use-reanthesis
item.description: Connect your AI to Reanthesis — MCP server, agent skills, and plugins so Claude, ChatGPT, and Copilot can build flashcards from your notes and manage your study data. Your AI, your data, your cards. — ⭐3, Shell

item.title: fncreator22/sentinel-mcp
item.description: A 3-stage safety guardrail agent for LLM coding assistants (Claude Desktop, Cursor, CodeX) via MCP protocol. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: gondola-ai/gondola-mcp
item.description: Cash-vs-award travel search MCP — hotels, flights, and rental cars across every major loyalty program, with cents-per-point valuations, loyalty tracking, and direct booking. — ⭐3, Dockerfile

item.title: yolonir/pi-codemcp
item.description: Typed, sandboxed Code Mode access to configured MCP servers for Pi — ⭐3, Python

item.title: renatogroffe/azurefunctions-dotnet10-mcp-fakedata
item.description: Implementação com .NET 10 + Azure Functions de MCP Server (stdio) para a geração de dados fake de empresas, contatos e produtos no padrão brasileiro. Inclui o uso da biblioteca Bogus. — ⭐3, C#

item.title: aka-kika/hig-mcp
item.description: MCP server serving Apple Human Interface Guidelines as structured design tokens for AI coding agents — post-WWDC25 system colors, Liquid Glass constraints, SwiftUI mappings. — ⭐26, Python

item.title: berkal749/mcp-discord-mod
item.description: A lightweight MCP server for Discord server moderation — ⭐5, TypeScript

item.title: luckeyfaraday/frontier-orchestrator
item.description: Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code: MCP server + skill that keeps Claude as lead engineer while delegating backend work to OpenAI Codex and frontend/design work to Kimi — ⭐5, TypeScript

item.title: FaramarzKowsari/ai-api-playbook
item.description: Companion source code for AI APIs in Practice, a visual engineering book on multimodal AI, agents, RAG, evaluation, governance, and production-ready products. Book DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21431944 · Softw — ⭐4, Python

item.title: appautomaton/pi-arcweld
item.description: An auditable local workspace for Pi: pinned upstream source, curated extensions, bounded MCP tooling, and a reproducible external runtime. — ⭐4, TypeScript

item.title: golam74/MCP_SERVER
item.description: — ⭐3, Python

item.title: twz007/java-obs-agent
item.description: Framework-agnostic Java observability sidecar agent: chat with a live JVM via MCP/web UI (metrics, slow calls, errors, logs, thread dumps, method traces). Self-hosted, attachable (Arthas-style). Apach — ⭐3, Java

item.title: WendyAi2005/codex-comsol-bridge
item.description: Community-built Codex–COMSOL bridge using officially supported MATLAB MCP and LiveLink integration layers, with native multiphysics API access, task-level execution, same-model Desktop observation, an — ⭐3, MATLAB

item.title: mergeos-bounties/mt4-mcp
item.description: mt4-mcp — MCP server for MetaTrader 4 account, quotes, and orders — ⭐3, Python

item.title: ethira-dev/mizpah
item.description: Local log explorer with a token-optimized MCP server. — ⭐3, Rust

item.title: Crymfox/YTGlean
item.description: YouTube transcript aggregation, summarization, and digest system with MCP server for AI agents. — ⭐3, Go

item.title: rocky007cn/ace-memory
item.description: Give every AI tool persistent memory. Free. Local. Self-improving. Zero cloud, zero API keys, 1 dependency. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: Ruisi-Lu/github-loop-engineering-skill
item.description: GitHub-native Loop Engineering skill: evidence-gated Issues and Projects workflows over the official GitHub MCP Server. — ⭐9, n/a

item.title: SingLinkLabs/singchat-mcp
item.description: Free live chat and AI support agent. Set it up from Claude Code, Cursor, ChatGPT, or Grok. No signup. — ⭐8, n/a

item.title: Get-Concord-AI/concord-mcp
item.description: Shared work-state for coding agents: claim work, leave handoffs, and generate review packets before PRs, over MCP. — ⭐6, TypeScript

item.title: autozw/gda-mcp-server
item.description: 安卓逆向工具gda-mcp-server 减少jadxmcp那样的内存压力 — ⭐5, Python
